tweets.text:
What Osama needs to understand is that we are a nation of laws and he violated the law when he entered illegally. 
His illegal entry is also cheating the millions of people who are standing in line that want to be part of this great nation that are doing things the right way. 

His own statements show he doesn’t qualify for asylum.
He is coming here for work, a better life and that isn’t asylum. There are people in this world that are actually trying to escape fear and persecution from their home government because of their political affiliation, their race, religion (real asylum as required by law). 

People like Osama push these folks back further in the line because CIS is so overwhelmed dealing with this unprecedented illegal immigration surge. 

You shouldn’t want to be a part of the greatest nation on earth and not respect our laws and commit a criminal act to enter. Entering this country illegally, is a crime as defined in Title 8 of the US Code.  

Millions are doing the exact same thing as Osama. The vast majority of people entering illegally DO NOT qualify for asylum. Folks can refer to them as “asylum seekers” but understand, the vast majority are just taking advantage of the open border.

tweets.text:
Make sure you read the end!

When you have an historic illegal immigration crisis, where millions enter the country illegally and the vast majority will be ordered removed by a judge because they either don’t show up in court or they simply don't qualify for asylum, it will result in an historic deportation operation.  That is what the law requires.  If they are not removed as ordered by a federal judge, then there is no real due process. You cannot demand the right to claim asylum and demand due process at great taxpayer expense to simply ignore the courts final decision and become a fugitive. Without consequence,  the border will never be secure and more women and children will be sexually assaulted by the cartels. More women and children will be the victims of trafficking. More deadly fentanyl will kill many more of our youth and more known and suspected terrorists will use our vulnerable border where we have an overwhelmed Border Patrol to enter this country without a trace.  This out of control border has resulted in a national security crisis of huge proportions. 

And I will come out of retirement for a second time and finish what we started!
Tom

How? Rather than trying to attack the guy that had unprecedented success on the border. How about a simple acknowledgement that this country’s national security as it relates to border security was never stronger.
Tom

tweets.text:
President Trump thanks Border Patrol and more….

“I want to wish everyone a very happy Thanksgiving.

Today, as we gather with our loved ones, we give thanks to Almighty God for his many blessings, including our families, our friends, our neighbors, and this extraordinary country that we all call home.

We also send our deep gratitude to all of the patriots serving our nation in uniform this Thanksgiving, including the members of the U.S. Armed Forces,the heroes of Border Patrol and law enforcement and ICE and everybody that worked so hard to preserve our system and our country and working to defend our southern border and our police and first responders and communities all across America.

This is a difficult time for our country, but do not lose heart or lose hope, because by the time we celebrate next Thanksgiving, our nation will be well on its way to being stronger, safer, more prosperous, and greater than ever before.

 Once again, Happy Thanksgiving,
 and God bless you all!”
